entry.title: New: CR 25-11 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 32 (2025), to amend the Fiscal year 2025 Budget, Appendix A, Part I, Grants and Restricted Use Revenues - Schedule of Grants and Restricted Use Revenues by Departments and Programs for Fiscal Year 2025, to add a new appropriation under the Department of Management entitled, “Community Development Block Grant - Disaster Recovery” in the amount of $1,639,381,000 with conditional language to 1) allow for disbursement for salaries and premium pay for up to 56.0 Limited Term Appointment equivalent personnel; and 2) require a copy of the quarterly report transmitted to the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development to also be submitted to the Council.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
